title: barleria subinermis
intro: Barleria subinermis is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, commonly known as a shrub or small tree. It is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant is known to possess anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including relieving congestion, reducing inflammation, and fighting off infections. Various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, can be made from the plant's leaves and stems to harness its medicinal properties.
